General.Name: Future Bright Mining Hldg Ltd
General.Description: Future Bright Mining Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the excavation and sale of marble blocks in Mainland China. It operates in two segments, Marble Block and Commodity Trading. The company holds an interest in the Yiduoyan project, an open pit mine covering an area of approximately 0.3973 square kilometers located in the Hubei Province, the People's Republic of China. It also produces and sells marble related products; and trades mineral commodities and coals. In addition, the company is involved in the mining and ore processing; sales of coals and coals products; and provision of technology development and transfer, service, and consulting services. Future Bright Mining Holdings Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Xiangyang, the People's Republic of China.
